chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2062 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 8258/25 2.For orders on o/objection 3.For orders on CMA 8140/25 4.For hearing of main case 09-12-2025 Mr. Mir Muhammad Bhagat, Advocate for petitioners. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks quashment of the FIR No.30 of 2025, registered at P.S, Bakhri district Naushahro Feroze, under sections 188, 441, 353, 506/2 PPC and 26 & 63 of Forest Act, 1927. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G, present in Court in other matters, was asked to verify status of the above FIR, who after confirms that interim Challan has been submitted. He has also places on record copy of said Challan. In these circumstances, the petition for quashment of FIR is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed application(s) leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy before the trial Court by way of filing application under section 265-K or 249-A CrPC, as the case may, if he desires so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
